raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 2
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent identifies one prior work (Spanner) and articulates the delta with a reference benchmark, but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags one missing citation (CockroachDB's latency figure).",
    "RX.1": "All output is presented as equally confident, with no uncertainty disclosure for out-of-reach claims.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly within scope with one drift: the agent focuses on abort rate reduction instead of exactly covering the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression: the agent introduces new errors by claiming parity with a historically important reference point while simultaneously listing several more recent systems that report substantially lower cross-region commit latencies.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies one prior work (Spanner) and articulates the delta with a reference benchmark, but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags one missing citation (CockroachDB's latency figure).
rationale.RX.1: All output is presented as equally confident, with no uncertainty disclosure for out-of-reach claims.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one drift: the agent focuses on abort rate reduction instead of exactly covering the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression: the agent introduces new errors by claiming parity with a historically important reference point while simultaneously listing several more recent systems that report substantially lower cross-region commit latencies.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
